title: ux-Checkbox
text: ux-Checkbox This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-Checkbox properties. ux-Checkbox widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-Checkbox Maps to physical widget: of type boolean Default definition: ux-Checkbox=uxCheckbox() Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Boolean fields to choose multiple options Related Links uxcheckbox The uxcheckbox widget is a Boolean input control. It indicates values of the Boolean field state. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
